calendar_assumption: Crypto-native weekly state panel uses Sunday-ended crypto weeks; returns sum daily log returns and state variables use week-end or prior week-end values by semantic type.
method_note: Sunday-ended crypto weekly aggregation; stablecoin supply is cleaner than raw USD TVL, while TVL is valuation-sensitive.
